title: pilosella × cinerea subsp. danubii
intro: Pilosella × cinerea subsp. danubii, also known as Danube pilosella, is a rare, hybrid plant species within the Pilosella genus. It is often used in traditional medicine, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Traditionally, Pilosella × cinerea subsp. danubii is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
